mapper.sql: id, parent_id, menu_name, menu_type, permission, path, component, icon, sort_order, visible, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_menu WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
SELECT FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND del_flag = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.del_flag = 0 AND m.status = 0 ORDER BY m.sort_order ASC
SELECT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND m.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY m.sort_order ASC
SELECT FROM sys_menu WHERE del_flag = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND del_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu (parent_id, menu_name, menu_type, permission, path, component, icon, sort_order, visible, status, del_flag, create_by, remark) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{menuName}, #{menuType}, #{permission}, #{path}, #{component}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, #{visible}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu SET del_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
